mapper.insert: INSERT INTO mbr_outbox ( tenant_id, aggregate_type, aggregate_id, event_type, payload, headers, trace_id, occurred_at, retry_count, status ) VALUES ( #{e.tenantId}, #{e.aggregateType}, #{e.aggregateId}, #{e.eventType}, #{e.payload, typeHandler=com.tulip.common.data.handler.JsonbTypeHandler}, #{e.headers, typeHandler=com.tulip.common.data.handler.JsonbTypeHandler}, #{e.traceId}, COALESCE(#{e.occurredAt}, now()), 0, 'PENDING' )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM mbr_outbox WHERE status = 'PENDING' ORDER BY occurred_at ASC, id ASC LIMIT #{limit} FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED
mapper.update: UPDATE mbr_outbox SET status = 'PUBLISHED', published_at = now() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE mbr_outbox SET retry_count = #{retryCount}, last_error = #{error}, status = CASE WHEN #{retryCount} >= 5 THEN 'DEAD' ELSE 'PENDING' END WHERE id = #{id}
